name: A Bitter Brew
journal: Furr · Steppe, Fisher's camp. · · Deliver poison to the water reservoir southwest of the Great Steppe Stronghold.

journal: Gideon Stroud · Steppe, North of the shore of Thousand Bones. · · Search for any evidence of Gideon's brother just west of the Arid Canal.

name: A Brother's Trail
journal: Gideon Stroud · Steppe, North of the shore of Thousand Bones. · · Following the note's directions, head south west to the coast in search for more evidence of Alaric's disappearance.

name: A Fateful Bet
journal: Dr. Glimmiwop · Goldenfield, Distant Farm. · · Find Beeswax around Nia, then locate Petroleum by D'Rek.

name: A Fishy Summons
journal: Triton · Windreach Woods, Lake house. · · Search the shore near Triton.

journal: Reyalp · Riverrise, First City Enter after the bridge. · · Gather these rare materials from veins, bushes and trees around the area!

name: A Nutty Situation
journal: Barkley Beats · Riverrise, City Center. · · Use your cooking skill to bake some chokwalatte.

name: A Pacifist's Dilemma

name: A Quiet Disposal
journal: Finn Hawthorne · Steppe, Adventures outpost. · · Head north of the outpost near the anomaly for Shroomageddon. Gather a Septic Seed from scolopendras. Finally, return to the Adventurer's Outpost and use the grinder to finish the drink.

name: A Second Chance
journal: Kira · Steppe, Fisher's camp. · · Kill hyenas and collect their blood for Kira. Mark fallen brothers by anomaly to the southeast.

name: A Sharp Donation
journal: Velvet Viper · Riverrise, City Center. · · Search the bar for the knives.

name: A Skullful of Solace
journal: SLPY-05 · Steppe, Junkyard slums. · · Defeat golems and use the mechanical board reader to examine their contents.

name: A Special Meal for Timmy
journal: Marigold Thornbuckle · Goldenfield, Edge farm. · · Head south to the Baxter's farm in Goldenfield.

name: A Taste of the Unusual
journal: Erwin "Bacon King" Braux · Riverrise, Butchery district. · · Head to the abandoned village south or the railway depot and swamp to the east for scrags.

name: A Taste to Die For
journal: Gragthar · Riverrise, City Center. · · Venture into the Ripplecrop Fields and search abandoned houses for pages of the cookbook.

name: A Toast to Enlightenment

name: A Yorner Trial
journal: Return to Zara Thorne at the Faiden Camp in Goldenfield to further discuss a Yorner trial.

journal: HPPY-01 · Steppe, Junkyard slums. · · Return the data to Dr. Queenie south at the Northsteppe Fort.

name: Allergic to Duty

journal: SNZY-04 · Steppe, Junkyard slums. · · Help SNZY-04 collect rare desert plant samples north along the northern coastline. Take the samples near the Hillside Well northwest of SNZY-04 , just short of the sandy beach and use the bio-machine.

name: Amplify the Catch
journal: Ol' Fins · Windstone Village, Windstone Lake's. · · Go the market in Windstone Village to the east.

name: An Ethical Appetite
journal: Triton · Steppe, near west Lost boats. · · Kill some hyenas for Triton nearby. He'll gather the meat later.

name: Ancient Artifacts
journal: Old Man Zephyr · Riverrise, City Center. · · Look closely around the area for these objects.

name: The Scribe's Dilemma
journal: Griz Turner · Goldenfield, near Artifact Shop · · Help Griz Turner replenish his artifact stock.

name: Making a Withdrawal
journal: Butch O'Hara · Goldenfield, near Pig farm · · Head west to the Goldenfield bank.

name: Beacon of Hope
journal: Kira · Steppe, Fisher's camp. · · Collect fuses on the island northeast of the Fishers camp and scattered around Smugglers Island and the several small islands that surround it. Afterward, light torches along the beach, starting east of Fishers Camp, down to the north of Silent Village.

journal: Paddy O'Lantern · Goldenfield, Walfare Kitchen · · Hunt birds around Goldenfield for an animal carcass.

journal: Trevor Barlow · Windreach Woods, Fort. · · Search the captain's trunks around the fort for his Calming Leaves.

journal: Blitz Hyperstorm · Steppe, Central Fort. · · Follow Blitz's trail of crushed cans south into the forest. His contract should be at the end of the trail.

journal: Mortimer Gloomsworth · Goldenfield, near Cemetery · · Retrieve bones from around Goldenfield for Mortimer Gloomsworth to bury in the cemetery.

journal: Martha "Big Mamma" Potterson · Goldenfield, near Welfare kitchen. · · Find 3 Wheat Seeds in barrels, crates or around the fields.

journal: Gideon Stroud · Steppe, North of the shore of Thousand Bones. · · Follow the clues from the note and head toward the western coast, past Coal Village. Alaric was last scene in this area.

journal: Butch O'Hara · Goldenfield, near Pig farm · · Head to the Skylight Grasslands and Sunweave Glade to find boarmammoths.

journal: Cyra "Byte" Kessler · Riverrise, River view. · · Search the bar for the hidden cards.

journal: Assist Biff "Dozer" Bromley in preparing the recruits around the Central Fort for the upcoming expedition.

journal: Maxwell Sterling · Dusktide Forest, near Wheat tent · · Check the pile of wood near the tent.

name: Catch of the Day
journal: Thorin Toastbeard · Windstone Village, Tavern. · · The tavern is in the northest of Windstone Village.

name: Catching Dreams
journal: Pax Voss · Riverrise, Bench behind the alchemy. · · Search for spiders south in the Ripplecrop Fields

name: Mission Imp- possible: Off- world Chips
journal: Dr. Orion Bloom · Goldenfield, Tent near the road. · · Search around the lake to the north west by Windstone Village.

journal: Bob Thurkle · Riverrise, Scene. · · Search old bushes for rare Chuckleberry leaves.

journal: Dwarfaton Ironchek · Windstone Village, Windstone blacksmith yard · · Collect Gritgrub Paste from сhests, barrels, crates… on Prison Island.

journal: D'Rek · Goldenfield, near Workshop · · D'Rek needs you to craft an Immuno-Stimulating Implant using a new recipe to test a theory on his failed attempts.

journal: Morick Voss · Westwind Woods, Valley of sins infestation. · · Kill some Occultists around the area.

name: Cosmic Concoction
journal: D'Rek · Goldenfield, near Workshop · · Collect 5 Meteoric Metal and 1 Titanium Nugget for D'Rek's project.

name: Crafting Concerns
journal: Lyra Vex · Steppe, Western fort. · · Gather curved pipes around the fort, and assemble the weapon before delivering it to Silas.

name: Brave New World - Crafting Proficiency
journal: Martha "Big Mamma" Potterson · Goldenfield, near Welfare kitchen · · Help folks around Goldenfield.

name: Culinary Diplomacy
journal: Thorin Toastbeard · Windstone Village, Tavern. · · Search for the Overgrown House to the north east of town. Professor Zephyr Yule should be around.

journal: Tharkon · Windreach Woods, Fort. · · Search for the Captain's body near the Altar north of the Quarry and collect any proof you find.

name: Dead Names and Living Circuits
journal: Journal localize

name: Decrypting Betrayal
journal: Louise Oldgarden · Reverie Hollow, Pastor s house. · · Kill 10 Dendroids around the forest.

name: Defectors' Round-up
journal: Roddy · Steppe, Western fort. · · Daxton and Greta are around the fort. Nud-E Leroy is northwest near Skeleton Cave on the beach. Triton is around the Lost Boats north of the Skeleton Cave and Slick Shady is at Coal Village to the north. You can find Horace around the Arid Canal, northeast of Coal Village.

name: Dismantling the Dendroid Guard
journal: Ludwig Schatten · Tempest Timberland, near the Hunter camp · · Ludwig tasks you with a dangerous hunt for a Dendroid Guard in the Tempest Timberland.

journal: Mort Decay · Steppe, Northsteppe fort. · · Help Mort Decay retrieve mysterious artifacts. Collect them to the southeast, between the Northeast Fort and the Eastern-Marsh Fort.

journal: Mabel Thorn · Steppe, Central Fort. · · Use the Bramble Dust on the Leaf Queen to extract Anomalous Plants. Bring the samples back to Mabel Thorn.

name: Desert Diplomacy
journal: Tor Drostin · Steppe, Central Fort. · · Find Zor by the coastline directly north, at the Fisher's Camp.

name: Deserted Hopes
journal: Roddy · Steppe, Western fort. · · Speak with Mary Jane Greenpuff in the Western Fort.

name: Desperate Depths
journal: Varkus Drov · Westwind Woods, Old mine near sawmill. · · Defeat Razorleaf Swarms around the forest.

name: Desperate for Dendroid
journal: Marigold Thornbuckle · Goldenfield, Edge farm. · · Head south to the house on the edge of the fields and find the cookbook.

name: Diamond Eyes

journal: Shawna Steelheart · Steppe, Adventures outpost. · · Search for the journals in their Riverrise homes. Finn and Gareth’s houses are in the northern part of town, while Zelina’s is northeast of town, over the bridge, where the road forks.

journal: Alexander Stones · Westwind Woods, Old Quarry overlooking platform. · · Talk to Dorik in the Westwind Quarry.

name: Disorderly Consequences
journal: Alaric Stormshade · Windreach Woods, Fort · · Find the paper next to Talora Vex, southwest at the Greystone Ruins. Deliver the note to Lyra Thornfeld southwest of Talora by The Last Order.

journal: Terrace Tenstone · Steppe, Northeast fort. · · Help Terrace by speaking with both the Rodgers' within the Northeast Fort about the draft mix-up.

name: Easy Rider
journal: Journal

journal: Hilda Deeproot · Westwind Woods, near Forest cabin · · Find the answers by speaking to the Wandering Spirit.

name: Echoes from the Front
journal: Barnaby Thorn · Steppe, Great steppe stronghold. · · Help Barnaby gather information by finding Vexina Strider around the Stronghold.

journal: DOPY-03 · Steppe, Junkyard slums. · · Help DOPY-03 retrieve a lost lightbearer's beacon from a Hyena in the northern desert.

journal: Greta Grubb · Goldenfield, Southern House · · Search barrels, crates or satchels on the side of the road full of eggplants.

journal: Dwarfaton Ironchek · Windstone Village, Windstone blacksmith yard · · Find a Werewolf Soldier on Prison Island, and beat it down to within an inch of its life. Then use the Essence Extractor and return the item to Dwarfaton.

journal: Tor Drostin · Steppe, Central Fort. · · Search the Great Steppes Stronghold to the west for any evidence that may uncover the secret plan.

name: Fowl Play
journal: Lily Baxter · Goldenfield, South farm · · Search the rat field for the scythe.

journal: Grizelda · Windreach Woods, Wooden mushroom house. · · Collect mana resin from magic trees in the forest.

journal: Ratchet · · D'Rek and Griz are both in Goldenfield. You'll find Grizzle Ironfoot south of the sawmill in Westwind Woods.

name: Mischief Masker
journal: Oswald · Goldenfield, Bank. · · Head south to Guru David's and find the masks laying around. Keep your eyes peeled.

name: Glimmer of Innovation
journal: Eamon Hardich · Westwind Woods, Sawmill Workers yard. · · Collect batteries from around the settlement.

name: Glimmers of the Past
journal: Draven Torvik · Windreach Woods, Parking spot. · · Search for the forest crystals to the southwest, across the railroad. If you hit the logging camp, you've gone too far.

journal: Elara Brightfall · Goldenfield, west of the Chicken farm · · Find gnats around Elara and to the north of her.

name: Grimbleton's Great Recipe Hunt
journal: Grimbleton · Riverrise, Alchemy. · · Find Triton near the Lake house in Windreach Woods!

journal: Themis · Windreach Woods, Fort. · · Kill some Dendroid Scouts around the forest.

name: Guarding Green
journal: Mary Jane Greenpuff · Windreach Woods, Road House · · Head south to the fort in the forest and talk to Themis.

journal: Zelina Ironweave · Steppe, Adventures outpost. · · Help Zelina by finding the lost gun southwest in the Candlewick Slums. Finn can be found around the Adventurer's Outpost.

journal: Flint Thistlewick · Steppe, Great steppe stronghold. · · Help Flint Thistlewick repair his steam-powered armor by collecting small gears from Small Golems.

name: Hangover Helper
journal: Dr. Queenie · Steppe, Northsteppe fort. · · Help Dr. Queenie recover from her hangover by gathering ingredients nearby for her hangover.

name: Harvesting the Fallen
journal: Mort Decay · Steppe, Northsteppe fort. · · Collect armor plates from Brisks for research purposes.

journal: Zibb "The Zest" Throttlebreech · Riverrise, Left side of the BAR yard. · · Find turtles around the waters of Riverrise.

journal: Mariel Venomtail · Windrach Woods, Mermaid Lake. · · Find Ivie Clarkson in Goldenfield.

name: Heart of the Woods
journal: Zogar · Goldenfield, near the Fuel station. · · Log Faint Timberheart Reserves around Goldenfield and surrounding forests.

journal: Jahri Roots · Goldenfield, west of Fuel station. · · Kill wolves in Dusktide Forest to collect their bones

name: Memory Restoration
journal: Ratchet · Goldenfield, near the Workshop · · Return the Memory Core to Doc Greene back on Prison Island.

name: Mine Over Matter
journal: Greta Grubb · Steppe, Western fort. · · Head north to plant land mines to defend against enemy forces. Just south of the Coal Village.

name: Wisdom within the Rocks
journal: Thordal Ironvein · Goldenfield, near the Fuel station · · Prove your worth by extracting Soft Crystal from Soft Crystal Veins and processing it into Powder Filler.

name: Mission Imp-Possible
journal: Martha "Big Mamma" Potterson · Goldenfield, near Welfare kitchen. · · Talk to Ratchet, Dr. Bloom, and Butcher about fighting imps.

name: Two much colour
journal: Blink-1n · Goldenfield, west of the Welfare kitchen · · Pull out the Violet weed species. Red species must remain untouched. It's important not to mix them up.

name: Mystery of Mary Jane
journal: Martha "Big Mamma" Potterson · Goldenfield, near Welfare kitchen. · · Check on Mary Jane Greenpuff at the Road House in Windreach Woods.

name: Mystery of the Masks
journal: Dorik Oakenshield · Westwind Woods, Old Quarry bottom · · Search around the quarry for three myserious masks.

name: Remember the Mystic
journal: Mortimer Gloomsworth · Goldenfield, near Cemetery · · Help Mortimer refresh his memory by crafting a Scar rune.

name: Nature's Redemption
journal: Mary Jane Greenpuff · Windreach Woods, Road house. · · Bring the set to the Themis at the Fort to the south west.

name: Neither Rain nor Battlefield
journal: Horace Grumbles · Steppe, near East of Arid canals. · · Deliver the letter to Tazara south of the Dragonbane Fort.

name: Forest's Bounty
journal: Hilda Deeproot · Westwind Woods, near Forest cabin · · Find the dream catcher to the south. The hag doesn't think it's too far away and is probably on the ground.

name: Brave New World - Welcome to Kwalat
journal: Follow the road north to Zikk's house.

name: No Witnesses to Glory
journal: Grizelda · Windreach Woods, Wooden mushroom house. · · Search Goldenfield for 5 posters.

name: Nuts for the Stew
journal: Fenwick "Fen" Harrow · Westwind Woods, Sawmill Workers yard. · · Take the batteries and put them in the generators around camp, then turn on the main transformer.

name: Obscured Intentions
journal: Penny "Stardust" Furbank · Reverie Hollow, Open air dining area. · · Search the gallows in Reverie Hollow for Penny's bong that has the deed hidden inside.

name: Package Pilfered
journal: Rusty Bowen · Windreach Woods, Railway stop near Fort. · · Kill fungus around the Windreach Woods.

name: Pages to Protect
journal: Mary Jane Greenpuff · Windreach Woods, Road house. · · Find Draven at the parking spot southeast of the fort. Balthazar hangs around the road house.

name: Pass the Butter
journal: QUEST-O-TRON · Windreach Woods, Camp near the shrine. · · Take the jar and collect Noxious Spores from purple mushrooms. Once you get enough, combine it into a poison.

name: Percival's Restorative Ointment
journal: Percival "Percy" Beamish · Goldenfield, Alcemy crafting yard · · Search for the flasks around the center of Goldenfield. The syringe has got to be around here close.

name: Phantom Fragment Recovery
journal: Clanker · Windreach Woods, Falling planes. · · Find Buck in Goldenfield and talk to him.

name: Genetically Gifted
journal: Butch O'Hara · Goldenfield, near Pig farm · · Kill boarmammoth in the Skylight Grasslands.

name: Portal Perils
journal: Driscoll-99 · Westwind Woods, Old Portal. · · Kill timbers around the forest.

name: Portal Purge Parade
journal: Driscoll-99 · Weswind Woods, Old Portal. · · Search the area and kill the monsters.

name: Portal Restorations
journal: Driscoll-99 · Westwind Woods, Old Portal. · · Head northeast past Goldenfield to the Ripplecrop Fields, south of Riverrise and kill spiders.

name: Grizzly Shiny Glory
journal: Grizzle Ironfoot · Westwind Woods, near the Old mine · · Embark on a daring adventure to unearth Rubies and Diamonds hidden deep within the Westwind Woods.

name: Price of Punishment
journal: Ace · Riverrise, City Center. · · Search for boars in the woods west of Riverrise, past the fields.

name: Proof of Purification
journal: Ludwig Stoncap · Steppe, Dragonbane fort. · · Help Ludwig gather ammo northeast past the Candlewick Slums! The mushrooms are directly east of the ammo.

name: Proving Loyalties
journal: Zor · Steppe, Fisher's camp. · · Kill the Ravager Hyena around the area to earn favor with Zor.

name: Proving the Steel
journal: Steel Stan · Steppe, Great Bones. · · Gather Lightbearer Badges east outside Great Bones Village, between the roads.

name: Brave New World - Welfare Program
journal: Zugg Clankwhistle · Goldenfield, near the Bureau · · Go east across the street to the welfare kitchen.

name: Puzzles of the Afterlife
journal: Captain Barnaby Plank · Riverrise, City Pier · · Find the ghost on Prison Island, solve his puzzle and return to Captain Barnaby Plank with the item.

name: Quelling the Rage
journal: Return to Zor at Fisher's Camp to figure out a solution to the Lightbearer's Artifact.

name: Venomous Voyage
journal: Grizzle Ironfoot · Westwind Woods, near the Old mine · · Search for Fungus camps in the Windreach Woods.

name: Rat-ical Blockchain Solutions
journal: Zoltar Blipchain · Goldenfield, near Wheat tent. · · Pick-up mouse traps from the field, then find some of the rat corpses.

name: Rehearsed Sabotage
journal: Blorp Knurt · Riverrise, Scene. · · Search the Creeping Marsh to the north, just above the top of the river.

name: Reluctant Reinforcement
journal: Biff "Dozer" Bromley · Steppe, Central Fort. · · Biff "Dozer" Bromley demands that you fulfill the duties of the recruits you scared off. Head west to the Great Steppe Stronghold and Western Fort. The Northsteppe Fort is east from Biff.

name: Resurrection Research
journal: Madame Mirage · Steppe, Western fort. · · Collect Conductive Bones from the Hyena Alpha, Elastic Bands from the Scolopendras. Deliver the items to Zeke Thompson at the Northsteppe Fort to ze east.

name: Revenge of the Rabbit
journal: Buck · Goldenfield, Violet Weed Field. · · Kill an Alpha Wolf for their brain. Head to Zugg's to use the cloning machine. Then, head to the farm to the south east near Energizer-21 and clean them up in the tub. Lastly, search for a skeleton in Suncrest Fields off the fork in the road to the south east outside of town.

name: Revival Overdrive
journal: Zeke "Gearhead" Thompson · Steppe, Northsteppe fort. · · Collect Charge Particles from defeating nearby golems.

name: Rock and Keg Roll
journal: Lola Vexar · Riverrise, Scene. · · Search the bar for the kegs.

name: Rusty Relics for Rituals
journal: Zugg Clankwhistle · Goldenfield, near the Bureau · · Search Prison Island for rare junk. Collect Rust-Eaten Weapon Chains, Tattered Beastskin Mantles, and Fractured Binding Stones and deliver them to Skrizzik.

name: Salvation from Madness
journal: Zor · Steppe, Fisher's camp. · · Search the Great Steppes for the dangerous, wandering Archosaur and slay it for the final artifact piece!

name: Scarecrow Showdown
journal: Skrizzik · Prison Island · · Place the scarecrow in front of Zugg's office in Goldenfield and make sure to speak with him after to rub it in.

name: Scattered Collectibles
journal: Clyde · Riverrise, Market in old town. · · Search Riverrise for all the Trading Cards.

name: Seasoned Delicacy
journal: Triton · Windreach Woods, Lake house. · · Find Thorin in Windstone Village to the east, past the lake.

name: Secrets Beneath
journal: Silas Whitlock · Riverrise, Hidden Chest · · Assist Silas Whitlock in dealing with the Fungus that keeps digging up his buried chest.

name: Secrets of the Invaders
journal: Furr · Steppe, Fisher's camp. · · Help Furr understand the human invaders by collecting their valuables within the Adventurer's Outpost.

name: Secrets Unearthed
journal: Colt "Muffinman" McGrady · Steppe, Great steppe stronghold. · · Help Colt "Muffinman" McGrady by finding the Spellbreaker Amulet to the north in the Candlewick Slums. After, head southwest to find the hidden stash.

name: Secure the Assets
journal: Oswald · Goldenfield, Bank. · · Bring Oswald materials to reinforce the bank's vault.

name: Security Measures
journal: Oswald · Goldenfield, Bank · · Use the blueprint to craft a Plazma Gun.

name: Sending the Alert
journal: Colt "Muffinman" McGrady · Steppe, Great steppe stronghold. · · Head northwest and find the transmitter south of the Arid Canal, past the lake. The parts are located around the Great Steppe Stronghold.

name: Sensing the Sands
journal: Xelcor Zinn · Steppe, Northsteppe fort. · · Grab four sensors from the fort and place one to the west of the South Winery. Go west and place on the rocky shore of the lake. Head east out of the fort and place one and finally to the south, just off the road.

name: Shadows Beneath the Sands
journal: Tor Drostin · Steppe, Central Fort. · · Head west to the Great Steppes Stronghold and sabotage the fort.

name: Sharpening Resolve
journal: Silas Thorne · Steppe, Western fort. · · Gather the weapon parts directly north of the Western Fort. When the road turns, continue straight north. Return with the pieces and use the anvil in the Western Fort to construct the new weapon.

name: Shattered Memory
journal: Mortimer Gloomsworth · Goldenfield, near Cemetery · · Venture back to Prison Island and find the ancient consoles to unlock the door and find the item for Doc Greene.

name: Shell We Eat?
journal: Butch O'Hara · Goldenfield, Barn. · · Search for turtles around bodies of water.

name: Signal in the Sands
journal: Colt "Muffinman" McGrady · Steppe, Great steppe stronghold. · · Help Colt 'Muffinman' McGrady restore the transmission systems northwest by the village, north to the cemetery, and northeast up the road from the slums.

name: Silencing the Rumors
journal: Tor Drostin · Steppe, Central Fort. · · Help Tor Drostin remove the inflammatory posters causing unrest at the outpost.

name: Slippery Passage
journal: Chad "Buzz" McNulty · Riverrise, Scene. · · Go south of the Ripplecrop Fields to the Train Station. Kill scrags to find a key and save the hostages.

name: Something Suspicious
journal: Alexander Stones · Westwind Woods, Old Quarry overlooking platform. · · Search the mine to the south, nearby Grizzle Ironfoot for the notes.

name: Spirited Away
journal: Dr. Queenie · Steppe, Northsteppe fort. · · Fetch liquor from the ruins to the northeast near the swamp line.

name: Spiritual Cleansing: Rocks and a Hard Place
journal: Guru David · Goldenfield, Yoga Lake. · · Search for Leaf Monster camps in the Skylight Grasslands.

name: Spiritual Cleansing: The Fragrant Gel
journal: Guru David · Goldenfield, Yoga Lake. · · Find gnats lurking in the fields and collect their wings.

name: Spiritual Cleansing: Flowers and Crystals of Persistence
journal: Guru David · Goldenfield, Yoga Lake. · · Search the clearings southwest for the Purple Poppy and Yellow Crystal.

name: Spore-tal Power
journal: Driscoll-99 · Westwind Woods, Old Portal. · · Kill fungus around the forest.

name: Stamp of Peace
journal: Tor Drostin · Steppe, Central Fort. · · Search for the notary northeast at the Winery.

name: Star-Powered Shot
journal: Thordal Ironvei · Goldenfield, Miner's crafting bench · · Look for an old tent among rocks and trees about halfway between Greta’s and the Faidens Camp.

name: Strange Green Pots
journal: Oakley "Dusty" Fenn · Westwind Woods, Sawmill kitchen. · · Find Dendroid Scouts in the forest around the sawmill.

name: Strumming Sorrow
journal: Felix · Riverrise, Musical Instrument Shop. · · Search the bars around Riverrise for the reciept and return it to Bart.

name: Substances of Suspicion
journal: Xelcor Zinn · Steppe, Northsteppe fort. · · Collect scolopendra hormones from creatures outside the fort.

name: Sunburned Escape
journal: Nud-E Leroy · Steppe, near Skeleton Cave. · · Defeat Leaf Dragons around the Steppe for leaf extract. Take the extract near Nud-E Leroy and mix it up into burn relief ointment for him.

name: Supply and Command
journal: Ratchet · Goldenfield, Weaponsmithing craft bench. · · Search veins outside Goldenfield for all the resources needed.

name: Testament of Strength
journal: Pastor Fazool · Reverie Hollow, Church. · · Travel once again to Prison Island and slay beasts and adventurers alike to appease Pastor Fazool.

name: The Art of Deception
journal: Hank Thornbuckle · Goldenfield, Edge farm. · · Search the Goldenfield bank and Zugg's house for the paintings.

name: The Betrayer's Blade
journal: Shawna Steelheart · Steppe, Adventures outpost. · · Search the battlefield, west down the road of the Great Steppe Cemetery and look for any clues.

name: The Big Reveal
journal: Grommuk Ironhand · Westwind Woods, Sawmill centre. · · Find Alex at the Westwind Quarry to the south.

name: The Blade's Dilemma
journal: Daxton Vance · Steppe, Western fort. · · Search for the Westend Village northwest and look for the cursed sword. Follow to the road north to the crossroads, then head west to the village.

name: The Case Against Triton
journal: Brawny Barrelbuckle · Windstone Village, Street gym. · · Find Roderick 'DarkSpike' Thinklatch in Windstone Village.

name: The Desert's Secret
journal: HPPY-01 · Steppe, Junkyard slums. · · Collect data from one of the three anomalies along the northern coast. They have been seen south of Fisher's Camp, to all the way east past the Hillside Well.

name: The Draft Dodger's Dilemma
journal: Lenny · Steppe, Central Fort. · · Help Lenny avoid the draft by retrieving the smut film from his lost camera.

name: The Elusive Cheese
journal: Seldon Moor · Riverrise, City Pier 2 · · Find the post office in Riverrise.

name: The Final Revelation
journal: Pastor Fazool · Reverie Hollow, Church. · · Find the phylactery on Prison Island. Use it to summon the boss. Defeat the boss, then return to Pastor Fazool.

name: The Final Verdict
journal: Baxton "Skip" Malroth · Windstone Village, Guard's place: west. · · Return to Triton on the north side of the lake.

name: The Fisherman's Bash
journal: Glubgrath · Skylight Grasslands, Gemini Lakes. · · Go to Windstone Village to the northwest.

name: The Great Pretender
journal: Slick Shady · Steppe, Coal Village. · · Hunt for the wandering Lizard Draco and kill it, making Slick Shady look like a hero.

name: The Guard's Dilema
journal: Themis · Windreach Woods, Fort. · · Deliver the package to Rusty, northwest to the train station above the fort.

name: The Heart of the Forest
journal: Grommuk Ironhand · Westwind Woods, Sawmill centre · · Collect the chainsaw, chain and gasoline around camp.

name: The Hunt for Green Puff
journal: Themis · Windreach Woods, Fort. · · Search the fort for the jugs and papers.

name: The Key to Ratchet's Repair
journal: Doc Greene · Prison Island · · Defeat the Werewolf Alpha to find the key to release the prisoners and return to Ratchet in Goldenfield.

name: The Laid Lover's Locket
journal: Maxwell Sterling · Dusktide Forest, near Tent. · · Search dead bodies around the forests for some jewelry.

name: The Last Order
journal: Morick Voss · Westwind Woods, Valley of sins infestation. · · Search the Valley of Sins for jars and take them to Trevor Barlow back at the fort.

name: The Light of Dagaron
journal: Pastor Fazool · Reverie Hollow, Church. · · Buy the blade from Ashley O’Connell on Prison Island to uncover the ritual. Wield it against seven statues in a single run fall once, and the balance is lost. Return the blooded blade to Pastor Fazool.

name: The Little Terror
journal: Lil Timmy · Goldenfield, Edge farm. · · Help Hank and Marigold to keep 'Lil Timmy's ass out of trouble.

name: The Matricidal Theory
journal: Zarnok · Riverrise, City Center. · · Search the city for a rat.

name: The Meat of the Matter
journal: "Zeek" Solomon · Riverrise, Butchery district. · · Gather Rawstead Carcass and Grilled Carcass. Some say they're best over a fire.

name: The Melody of Misfortune
journal: Bart Blaine · Riverrise, Musical Instrument Shop. · · Find Felix and take the horn to him.

name: The Painted Betrayal
journal: Pastor Fazool · Reverie Hollow, Church. · · Check the paintings in the barn.

name: The Prankster's Peace
journal: Buck · Goldenfield, Violet Weed Field. · · Search abandoned houses outside of town to the east for a clock. Combine it with the package and deliver to Lily.

name: The Real Culprit
journal: Claudine Baxter · Goldenfield, South farm · · Find 'Lil Timmy at his farm in eastern Goldenfield.

name: The Role of a Lifetime
journal: Slick Shady · Steppe, Coal Village. · · Help Slick Shady by killing small Archeosaurs around different camps while he finds the artifacts location.

name: The Siren's Temptation
journal: Seaonna · Windreach Woods, Mermaid Lake · · Kill leaf monsters around the forest and collect Verdant Leaves.

name: The Sweet Escape
journal: Ivie Clarkson · Goldenfield, Goldenfield, near the Bureau. · · Kill gnats around Goldenfield for their larvae.

name: Thirst for Understanding
journal: Furr · Steppe, Fisher's camp. · · Collect poison from Mantha explosive remains to assist Furr with his research.

name: Thistlebrook's Terrifying Task
journal: Thistlebrook · Riverrise, Bench behind the alchemy. · · Complete quests for Pax and Ophelia.

name: Brew the Beans, Warm the Soul
journal: Nia Sundance · Goldenfield, near Summer house. · · Pick up the coffee from the cafe and take it to Maxwell in Dusktide Forest.

name: Threading the Dream
journal: Lila Algernon · Riverrise, Scene. · · Go to the fields outside Riverrise and kill spiders.

name: Tides of Vengeance
journal: Mariel Venomtail · Windreach Woods, Mermaid Lake · · Search the Hunter Camp to the east for the pages.

name: To the Moon, via the Fields
journal: Zoltar Blipchain · Goldenfield, near Wheat tent. · · Assist Zoltar in curbing the rat infestation in his wheat fields.

name: Toxic Ambition
journal: Soko Uno · Riverrise, Scene · · Go to the souther Riverrise bridge. Cross it and head directly east across the river into the woods.

name: Trial of the Marked
journal: Survive on Prison Island for 10 minutes while being relentlessly hunted. Then extract safely.

name: Trial of Unyielding Will
journal: Wulbyan Bloodroar · Goldenfield, Faidens camp top centre · · Eat the disgusting meat, and prove your strength by defeating enemies on the island while weakened.

name: Trial of Worthiness
journal: Zara Thorne · Goldenfield, Faidens camp top centre · · Journey to the Prison Island and defeat opponents of a certain class.

name: Turning the Tide
journal: The Guardinator · Seppe, Great steppe stronghold. · · Assist the Guardinator by eliminating golems in the area. Targets reported northwest near the Great Bones Village.

name: Unbottling Mercy
journal: Rufus · Riverrise, Butchery district. · · Head to the first field northwest and search for the bottle.

name: Unearthing Obsession
journal: Alex "Hooty" Howizer · Steppe, Great steppe stronghold. · · Find the artifact north between the Great Steppe Cemetery and the lake. If repairs are needed, head south of its location for artifact parts.

name: Unearthing the Truth
journal: Zor · Steppe, Fisher's camp. · · Search south, past the anomaly for the fallen Lightbearer envoy near the road.

name: Unlocking the Troll Head Ritual
journal: Skrizzik · Prison Island · · Visit Doc Greene on the island for his notes. Then go to the Northern Wastelands and meet Furr for knowledge. Lastly, in the Westwind Woods, speak with Sirena Hexblade. Finally, go to Goldenfield and report to Zugg.

name: Unmasking the Conspiracy
journal: Alexander Stones · Westwind Woods, Old Quarry overlooking platform. · · Wander through the mines looking for weapons.

name: Unmasking the Impostor
journal: Bob Thurkle · Riverrise, Scene. · · Go to the pier on the north east side of town and find the mask.

name: Unsettling Return
journal: Gareth Rucker · Steppe, Adventures outpost. · · Assist Gareth with enchanting the mysterious artifact at the Quarran Altar Obelisk. Head north to the Greatsteppe Cemetery. After enchanting the artifact, take it to Barnaby for inspection.

name: Unveiling Dark Secrets
journal: Alexander Stones · Westwind Woods, Old Quarry overlooking platform. · · Search for an abandoned house south of Varkus.

name: Unveiling The Bound Requiem
journal: Kings Head · Prison Island · · Collect Vertebrae of Obedience from the Scrags and Pallid Tongues from the Ghouls on Prison Island and take them to Hilda Deeproot in the Westwind Woods.

name: Unveiling the Hidden Truth
journal: Jennifer Davyna · Steppe, Great steppe stronghold. · · Search for an abandoned house northwest by the Great Bones Village that contains evidence of a conspiracy.

name: Valuable Research
journal: Rancor K'Zar · Steppe, Northsteppe fort. · · Help collect valuable items north of the Northeast Fort to the southeast.

name: Vanity's Elixir
journal: Zorbul Z'nar · Goldenfield, Distant Farm. · · Search the South Farm in Goldenfield in the South East corner.

name: Vase of the Cracked-tastrophe
journal: Griz Turner · Goldenfield, near Artifact shop. · · Gather ceramics and return to Griz.

name: Explosive Engineering
journal: Ratchet · Goldenfield, near the Workshop · · Help Ratchet craft a Assault Launcher.

name: Wet Paper
journal: Balthazar "Baz" Grimble · Windreach Woods, Road house. · · Search the shoreline north of the roadhouse for unpaid bar tabs.

name: Whispers in the Dark
journal: Varkus Drov · Westwinds Woods ,Old mine near sawmill. · · Talk to Alexander in the Westwind Quarry to the south.

name: Whispers in the Woods
journal: Dorik Oakenshield · Westwind Woods, Old Quarry bottom · · Search the old house to the north east of the quarry.

name: Wood You Believe It?
journal: Zogar · Goldenfield, Logging spot. · · Grab some Calm Aloe from the alchemy area behind the welfare kitchen. An energy drink named ‘Sildenafil’ from a little crossroads just south of here. You’ll see the yellow lights. Lastly a psycho mushroom from the yoga house.

name: Study of the Wooden Deer
journal: Ludwig Schatten · Tempest Timberland, near the Hunter camp · · Embark on a perilous hunt for a Wooden Deer in Windreach Woods for Ludwig's research.

name: Wulbyan's Challenge
journal: Wulbyan Bloodroar · Goldenfield, Faidens camp top centre · · Open the legendary chest on the southwest corner of Prison Island and retrieve Raiders Totems to give to Wulbyan.

name: Eggs for Breakfast
journal: Guru David · Goldenfield, Yoga Lake · · Search farms around Goldenfield or butcher birds.

name: The Young Woodraptor Predicament
journal: Ludwig Schatten · Tempest Timberland, near the Hunter camp · · Ludwig needs your help to hunt a Young Woodraptor in Westwind Woods for his research.
